overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character walks through hieroglyphic-covered corridors, enters a courtyard under construction with scaffolding, passes through a gateway flanked by massive seated pharaoh statues, and emerges into an open palm-lined plaza overlooking water and mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered temple corridor with hieroglyphic walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow hieroglyphic corridor toward the bright exit ahead

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing near the gateway arch ahead

entered.detail: tall stone walls covered in colorful ancient Egyptian hieroglyphics and figures
ornate red patterned carpet running down the center of the corridor floor
large stone archway at the end of the corridor leading to the exterior courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, covered temple corridor with elaborately decorated hieroglyphic walls on both sides. A red carpet runs down the center of the marble floor toward a bright gateway arch ahead, where a guard stands silhouetted against the daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard under construction with scaffolding

events.description: exits the covered corridor into the open temple courtyard with construction scaffolding

agents.ego_description: emerging from the corridor and walking across the decorated courtyard floor scattered with flower wreaths

notable_agents.action: worker arranging large woven wreaths on the ground near scaffolding

entered.detail: wooden scaffolding structures against the temple walls indicating restoration work
circular wreaths and scattered flowers decorating the courtyard floor
tall ceremonial vases with plants placed near the scaffolding
massive temple entrance with towering columns and detailed carvings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a sunlit temple courtyard actively under construction. Wooden scaffolding lines the walls, and the ground is scattered with ceremonial flower wreaths. Workers and visitors stand around the space as the character walks toward a massive temple facade ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner courtyard approaching the seated statue gateway

events.description: character turns left toward the gateway flanked by large seated statues

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking toward the imposing gateway with seated pharaoh statues while observing the construction activity

notable_agents.action: worker kneeling and working near the base of the right statue

entered.detail: massive dark stone statues of seated pharaohs flanking the entrance gateway
stacks of sack bags and construction materials piled near the scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and approaches a gateway guarded by two massive seated pharaoh statues. Workers continue restoration work nearby, with scaffolding and construction materials visible. The ground remains decorated with scattered flowers and wreaths as the character moves toward the shadowed entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered passage between two massive seated statues

events.description: enters the covered corridor flanked by the two large seated statues
a child NPC runs across the frame from right to left in front of the character

agents.ego_description: walking through the imposing gateway passage between the two massive statues toward the bright exit

notable_agents.action: child running quickly across the path from right to left

entered.detail: decorated interior walls of the gateway passage with hieroglyphics

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered passage between two colossal seated pharaoh statues, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadowed interior. A child runs across the path ahead as the character continues toward the bright exit visible at the far end of the corridor, where scaffolding is visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open palm-lined plaza overlooking water and mountains

events.description: exits the temple interior into the open plaza with palm trees and view of water
full sunlight exposure as character descends the stairs into the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs into the open plaza, passing guards standing at attention on either side

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing at attention with spear
temple guard standing at attention with spear

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the plaza entrance
tall stone obelisk standing in the plaza ahead
mountain range visible in the distance beyond the water
small market stalls with goods displayed on the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the temple into a bright, open plaza lined with palm trees. Guards stand at attention on either side of the stairs as the character descends into the space. An obelisk rises in the center distance, with mountains and water visible beyond, and market stalls line the left side of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior temple path with view of the massive temple walls

events.description: character turns left to walk along the exterior temple wall

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking along the exterior temple wall, looking up at the massive architecture and statues

entered.detail: massive exterior wall of the temple with large hieroglyphic carvings
giant standing statues embedded in the temple exterior wall
tall poles with red flags mounted on top of the temple structure

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to walk along the exterior of the temple complex, revealing the massive scale of the structure. Giant statues and hieroglyphic-covered walls tower overhead, with red flags flying from poles atop the building. The path runs along a dirt trail with palm trees now on the right side as the character continues exploring the exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, decorated interior of a temple through a bustling construction site and back into a monumental gateway. It begins in a narrow, covered corridor where the camera follows a red carpet between walls of elaborate hieroglyphics toward a bright, silhouetted archway. As the character emerges from the corridor, the scene opens into a sunlit courtyard filled with workers, wooden scaffolding, and ceremonial flower wreaths scattered across the ground. The camera then turns left toward a massive temple facade, passing by two colossal seated pharaoh statues while restoration work continues nearby. Finally, the movement transitions from the bright exterior into the deep shadows of a covered passage between the statues, passing a running child before heading toward a distant, light-filled exit.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open plaza into a close-up exploration of the temple's massive exterior walls. It begins as the character emerges from the temple and descends stairs flanked by guards, entering a wide space lined with palm trees and market stalls. As the camera moves forward, the view opens up to reveal a central obelisk set against a backdrop of distant mountains and water. The scene then shifts as the character turns left, moving away from the plaza to walk along a dirt trail where the environment is dominated by the towering scale of the temple complex. Finally, the perspective focuses on the giant statues and hieroglyphic-covered walls that loom overhead, with red flags fluttering from poles atop the structure.
